title: TES IV: Oblivion OST
description: Replace the Minecraft soundtrack with the soundtrack from The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion.
body:
This resource pack replaces some of the Minecraft soundtrack with music from the video game "The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion".

Replace music from the Overworld and the Nether... FLINT AND STEEL ! (sorry)

DM me on discord to report an issue or if you have an idea: mazdo6725
